channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: An elderly man caring for his aging dog shows the kind of lo…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: An elderly man caring for his aging dog shows the kind of loyalty dogs teach us without words. Senior dogs need extra attention, but the bond only deepens with time.
item.content:encoded: An elderly man caring for his aging dog shows the kind of loyalty dogs teach us without words. Senior dogs need extra attention, but the bond only deepens with time.

item.title: 本日はブランドAFFLUXから結婚指輪をご紹介させて頂きます! flash ゆびわ言葉：輝かしい二人 miyabi.mu…
item.author: 雅-miyabi-【公式】婚約指輪・結婚指輪専門店 (@miyabibridal.bsky.social)
item.description:
本日はブランドAFFLUXから結婚指輪をご紹介させて頂きます!
flash
ゆびわ言葉：輝かしい二人
miyabi.mu/ring/ring_00...
『想い合える相手がいる幸せが、お互いをずっと輝かせていきまうように。』という想いが込められています♪
K18ピンクゴールドとK18イエローゴールドの２本重ねて着けて頂けるリングです♡
２本ともメレダイヤの数やフォルムが違うお洒落な結婚指輪です☆
２本重ねて着けて頂くと少し空間が出来るのでお手元をスッキリと見せてくれます!!
メンズは幅を持たせたシンプルで動きのあるリングになっております☆

雅-miyabi-はAFFLUX正規取り扱い店です💁🏻‍♀️
item.content:encoded:
本日はブランドAFFLUXから結婚指輪をご紹介させて頂きます!
flash
ゆびわ言葉：輝かしい二人
miyabi.mu/ring/ring_00...
『想い合える相手がいる幸せが、お互いをずっと輝かせていきまうように。』という想いが込められています♪
K18ピンクゴールドとK18イエローゴールドの２本重ねて着けて頂けるリングです♡
２本ともメレダイヤの数やフォルムが違うお洒落な結婚指輪です☆

メンズは幅を持たせたシンプルで動きのあるリングになっております☆

item.title: I am shaking because I found a LeBron James rookie card that…
item.author: Gurt Sherm (@gurtsherm.bsky.social)
item.description:
I am shaking because I found a LeBron James rookie card that sells between $150 and $400

and somehow when I was eight years old I hat the foresight to put it in a sealed container
item.content:encoded:
I am shaking because I found a LeBron James rookie card that sells between $150 and $400

and somehow when I was eight years old I hat the foresight to put it in a sealed container

item.title: Anyone else's hydrangeas go completely nuts in the PNW this …
item.author: Michele (@burienwino.bsky.social)
item.description: Anyone else's hydrangeas go completely nuts in the PNW this year? 🌱
item.content:encoded: Anyone else's hydrangeas go completely nuts in the PNW this year? 🌱

item.title: アメリカ軍、イランに追加の空爆を開始 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO... アメリカ中央軍…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
アメリカ軍、イランに追加の空爆を開始
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

アメリカ中央軍はSNSで、ホルムズ海峡を通る商船を攻撃した責任をイランに問うと説明しました。

イラン側は海峡の再封鎖を示唆しており、緊張が高まっています。

トランプ氏は「彼らは合意を結ぶ方法がわからない。夜中に船を撃ちまくっている」と不満を漏らしました。

#ニュース
item.content:encoded:
アメリカ軍、イランに追加の空爆を開始
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

アメリカ中央軍はSNSで、ホルムズ海峡を通る商船を攻撃した責任をイランに問うと説明しました。

イラン側は海峡の再封鎖を示唆しており、緊張が高まっています。

トランプ氏は「彼らは合意を結ぶ方法がわからない。夜中に船を撃ちまくっている」と不満を漏らしました。

#ニュース

item.title: Though imagine a Mad Max world where there's no water and th…
item.author: YurilyArt ユリリ＠創作百合 #CommsOpen (@yurilyart.bsky.social)
item.description: Though imagine a Mad Max world where there's no water and this cult needs to keep feeding the machine (their god), so they keep using blood to feed it. And they fight the heroes who are just trying to survive hell while squinting and saying "Hating AI is so performative."
item.content:encoded: Though imagine a Mad Max world where there's no water and this cult needs to keep feeding the machine (their god), so they keep using blood to feed it. And they fight the heroes who are just trying to survive hell while squinting and saying "Hating AI is so performative."

item.title: このたび、第十八回伊丹十三賞を受賞いたしました。 のんさん、星野源さん、宮藤官九郎さん…と、歴代の受賞者がきらびやかすぎ…
item.author: 岸本佐知子 (@karyobinga.bsky.social)
item.description:
このたび、第十八回伊丹十三賞を受賞いたしました。
のんさん、星野源さん、宮藤官九郎さん…と、歴代の受賞者がきらびやかすぎて、「本当においらでいいのかい?？」と大いにキョドっておりますが、素直に嬉しいです。
ありがとうございます。

www.asahi.com/and/entertai...
item.content:encoded:
このたび、第十八回伊丹十三賞を受賞いたしました。
のんさん、星野源さん、宮藤官九郎さん…と、歴代の受賞者がきらびやかすぎて、「本当においらでいいのかい?？」と大いにキョドっておりますが、素直に嬉しいです。
ありがとうございます。

www.asahi.com/and/entertai...

item.title: 本日もお疲れ様でした❣️ チキン南蛮作ろうかと鶏肉解凍したものの、玉ねぎがなかったので、、😭😭 鶏肉とパプリカとキ…
item.author: まいまい (@raimuti.bsky.social)
item.description:
本日もお疲れ様でした❣️

チキン南蛮作ろうかと鶏肉解凍したものの、玉ねぎがなかったので、、😭😭
鶏肉とパプリカとキノコの
マリネ😂😂😂😂

穏やかな夜を🌙🙏✨

item.title: A new production of ‘Die Frau Ohne Schatten,’ conducted by K…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: A new production of ‘Die Frau Ohne Schatten,’ conducted by Klaus Mäkelä, proved a highlight of this year’s festival in Provence, France, in contrast to its incoherent stagings of two Mozart works. on.wsj.com/3QNoNeh
item.content:encoded: A new production of ‘Die Frau Ohne Schatten,’ conducted by Klaus Mäkelä, proved a highlight of this year’s festival in Provence, France, in contrast to its incoherent stagings of two Mozart works. on.wsj.com/3QNoNeh

item.title: #ブルスカ一点集中な絵描きさんと繋がりたい #自創作に狂っている人間と繋がりたい 併用して使わせていただきます…！ 呟き…
item.author: スズメヤ (@suzume810ka.bsky.social)
item.description:
#ブルスカ一点集中な絵描きさんと繋がりたい
#自創作に狂っている人間と繋がりたい
併用して使わせていただきます…！
呟き系のSNSは青空くんしか利用して無いです＞＜
一次創作と二次創作雑多ですが、どちらも無言巡回致します。
今は一次創作集中しているので、自創作やってる方だと嬉しいです☺️
気ままにのんびり交流出来たら幸いです。よろしくです〜
item.content:encoded:
#ブルスカ一点集中な絵描きさんと繋がりたい
#自創作に狂っている人間と繋がりたい
併用して使わせていただきます…！
呟き系のSNSは青空くんしか利用して無いです＞＜
一次創作と二次創作雑多ですが、どちらも無言巡回致します。
今は一次創作集中しているので、自創作やってる方だと嬉しいです☺️
気ままにのんびり交流出来たら幸いです。よろしくです〜

item.title: アサヒ、サイバー被害でも強気の最高益予想 挽回のキレが達成左右 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQ…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
アサヒ、サイバー被害でも強気の最高益予想　挽回のキレが達成左右
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

「スーパードライ」を刷新し、ビール類の販売は5％増をめざすなど反転攻勢。

2026年12月期の連結純利益は過去最高の1940億円、売上収益は初の3兆円超えを見込みます。
item.content:encoded:
アサヒ、サイバー被害でも強気の最高益予想　挽回のキレが達成左右
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

「スーパードライ」を刷新し、ビール類の販売は5％増をめざすなど反転攻勢。

2026年12月期の連結純利益は過去最高の1940億円、売上収益は初の3兆円超えを見込みます。

item.title: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by havi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by having their vital organs removed for donation? The ethical concerns are substantial. n.pr/4eSPQxR
item.content:encoded: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by having their vital organs removed for donation? The ethical concerns are substantial. n.pr/4eSPQxR

item.title: It is a truth universally acknowledged that a person living …
item.author: Anne Thériault (@annetheriault.bsky.social)
item.description: It is a truth universally acknowledged that a person living through an Ontario summer must be in want of a dock on a lake
item.content:encoded: It is a truth universally acknowledged that a person living through an Ontario summer must be in want of a dock on a lake

item.title: Marcel had a little emergency Monday night. He is home and f…
item.author: Cats of Yore (@catsofyore.bsky.social)
item.description: Marcel had a little emergency Monday night. He is home and fine now, but it was scary for a while and we had an overnight stay at the emergency vet. It was so terribly quiet here without my precious tornado man. Hug your babies and appreciate every moment!
item.content:encoded: Marcel had a little emergency Monday night. He is home and fine now, but it was scary for a while and we had an overnight stay at the emergency vet. It was so terribly quiet here without my precious tornado man. Hug your babies and appreciate every moment!

item.title: There’s no scientific basis to many of the public health con…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
There’s no scientific basis to many of the public health concerns some critics have with solar development, an expert told ProPublica.

“People try to come up with a rationale to justify their dislike of things they dislike for other reasons.”

(Published April)
item.content:encoded:
There’s no scientific basis to many of the public health concerns some critics have with solar development, an expert told ProPublica.

“People try to come up with a rationale to justify their dislike of things they dislike for other reasons.”

(Published April)

item.content:encoded: I mean Stephen King would have come up with something way better than that shite, but in general...yeah.

item.title: We're saying our goodbyes to Quincy. She can't get better …
item.author: JT Retired Medic (@jt-retiredmedic.bsky.social)
item.description:
We're saying our goodbyes to Quincy.

She can't get better and nothing is working.

John & I are with her as she transitions to her next life.

I believe Tucker boy is waiting for her.

Keep a good thought for us.
item.content:encoded:
We're saying our goodbyes to Quincy.

She can't get better and nothing is working.

John & I are with her as she transitions to her next life.

I believe Tucker boy is waiting for her.

Keep a good thought for us.

item.title: The strangest thing happened today. We went to the uninhabit…
item.author: Per Ahlberg (@perahlberg.bsky.social)
item.description: The strangest thing happened today. We went to the uninhabited island of Lunga, west of Mull, to look at the puffins nesting there. I was just taking photos when I felt a thump as something landed quite heavily in my head. It was a puffin! It stayed for about a minute before flying off.
item.content:encoded: The strangest thing happened today. We went to the uninhabited island of Lunga, west of Mull, to look at the puffins nesting there. I was just taking photos when I felt a thump as something landed quite heavily in my head. It was a puffin! It stayed for about a minute before flying off.
